I recently had the pleasure of working with an exceptional attorney who truly went above and beyond to ensure my success in winning my situation. From the very beginning, they demonstrated a remarkable level of dedication and commitment to my cause. What truly set this attorney apart was their unwavering belief in my case and their genuine care for my well-being. They took the time to understand my needs and concerns, and their guidance and support were invaluable during what was undoubtedly a challenging and emotional time.

Thanks to their expertise and tenacity, I achieved a favorable outcome in my case. Their attention to detail, persuasive arguments, and relentless advocacy were instrumental in securing the best possible outcome for me.

Dave Driggers is the best lawyer that I've ever had.  When I found him online and set up a consultation for the first time, he had studied the documents related to my case beforehand and already set up a plan and proposal  on how best I move forwad.  That was definitely above and beyond my expectations and  that set him apart from other lawyers I had consulted.  After I retained him and he took my case, he did everything that he said that he would do and more.  He's kind, smart, thoughtful, and will always make you feel like he's got your best interest at heart, like he will go to battle for you if necessary to get the best possible outcome for your situation.  He's polite, he's professional, but more than that, he's approachable.  He's the kind of attorney that you can email and know that he will respond with help and advice quickly.   He is the best family law attorney in Georgia.  He's definitely the best family law attorney I've worked with anywhere, actually.  He genuinely cares about clients and it definitely shows.  When I flew out for my hearing with the case he helped me with, he showed up to court feeling under the weather.  However, that didn't stop him from presenting the best possible care for my situation and I'll always be grateful that I happened to find him. I wouldn't have even known he wasn't feeling well if he hadn't told me that morning.  I was amazed at how he put all of that on the back burner and completely focused on my case and the hearing at hand.  It was like he turned off all of his personal discomfort and channeled everything he could into that hearing completely which could not have been an easy thing to do.  I truly highly recommend him.  He puts in the time and work to maximize your experience with him and I truly believe that he is the best that you will find.  He has the knowledge, he has the experience, and he has the heart.  Family law can be conflicted and harsh.  With him, though, I felt like I had the biggest support I could have imagined. He's been a sounding board for me since my case basically finished and I can not thank him enough for the advice and help that he has given me over the past few years. You will not regret retaining him  He will be prepared, be professional, and be your best support throughout the process.  I can't say enough about  his work.  Just know that you'll be in amazing hands with him.  Thank you, Dave, for being the best person I could have asked for in my situation. You went above and beyond and there's not even enough words for the gratitude I feel towards you and your practice.

I received a Notice of objection to confirmation. I have again been trying to contact this man to find out what my next steps are and I still have not received a return on any phone calls or emails. Please do not waste your time with this man, he will rip you off and you will get noting in return i am now seeking new counsel.

From the moment you step into Ayerbe and Arnold Law Firm in Macon, Georgia, you can feel the difference. This is not just a law firm. It is a team of superheroes disguised in professional attire. They are the gold standard of helpfulness, professionalism, and sheer dedication.

They do not just handle your legal matters. They adopt them as their own. They go above and beyond, over and under, sideways and diagonally to make sure you are taken care of. Their commitment is matched only by their love for the Macon community. You can tell this is not just where they work. It is their home, and they are devoted to making it better every single day.

Special shoutout to the dynamic duo, Sheree Denney and Amber Knox. Sheree is the calm in the storm, the one who somehow makes even the most stressful legal situations feel like a walk in the park. A park filled with sunshine and free ice cream. Amber is the one who will catch the tiniest detail, the hidden advantage, the golden opportunity, and make sure it works in your favor. Together, they are unstoppable.

If you want a legal team that treats you like family, fights for you like champions, and makes you wonder if they might just be part magician, Ayerbe and Arnold is it. Macon is lucky to have them, and so am I.

Amber is one of the most sufficient and Hands-On attorney that I have ever dealt with. One thing for sure about Amber is she would return every one of my calls within 2 hours of leaving her a message... That is unheard of, with most attorneys today. I would recommend Amber  HIGHLY ,,, 10 STAR to anyone that is needa attorney

The communication was clear and timely. I never had to question what was going on with our case. Paul and his team went above and beyond to work with us and get my son the compensation he deserved. I highly recommend AA Law.

All the people working at this firm are amazing.  They took care of us 100% during our entire process.  They took care of all the things we needed to do.  I highly recommend them for any of your needs.

I had the opportunity to work with Ayerbe & Arnold and I can confidently say they exceeded my expectations in every aspect of legal service. From the very beginning, their professionalism, expertise, and client-centered approach stood out. I’m glad that I chose AA Law
They made my process very smooth and fast and got me the best amount for my car accident. Can’t thank them enough!

He is the BEST!

As a parent, finding a legal team that truly cares is a blessing, and Lovitt Law Group, led by Bob Lovitt, has been nothing short of exceptional. Bob and his team treat us like family, always going above and beyond to ensure we feel supported and cared for. Bob is incredibly generous with his time and attention, and we can reach out to him anytime for guidance. He always checks in on my daughter and us as both a friend and her lawyer.  In times of need, their compassion shines brightly, reminding us of the words from Galatians 6:2: “Carry each other’s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.” Their dedication and care reflect this principle beautifully.
I wholeheartedly recommend Bob Lovitt and the Lovitt Law Group for anyone seeking not just legal expertise but genuine, heartfelt support.

Mr. Lovett and his team are second to none.  His tenacity in the courtroom is something to behold just make sure he's in your corner. I am Bob Lovett’s wife, but this review is rooted in truth, not bias.  I have watched Bob dedicate his life’s worked to law, and his passion and discipline are unmatched. For over 35 years, he has fought tirelessly for his clients in planning and zoning environmental law, personal injury, and healthcare law. He masters complex issues, prepares relentlessly, and stands firm when the stakes are high. Bob does not take shortcuts, he doesn’t posture, and he doesn’t back down when integrity matters. He earns respect in every room he enters- whether advocating for injured individuals, guiding healthcare providers, or navigating high- level land use and environmental matters. His reputation has been built case by case, community by community, on results, credibility and trust. If you want an attorney  that leads with experience, conviction, and professionalism- Bob Lovett is that lawyer.

I am highly disappointed with the lack of professional correspondence from Cooper Barton & Cooper. Based on a high recommendation from a friend who is a paralegal, I had high expectations for their client case management. Unfortunately, my experience has been the exact opposite.
I had a consultation with Attorney Ken Barton back in July 2025. I was assured I had a strong case and told that he simply needed to review it with his partners for final approval. Since then, I have had to follow up numerous times, only to be met with false statements and total uncertainty.
It appears the firm is experiencing a chaotic transitional period; every single person I was previously in correspondence with is no longer employed there. It is now March 2026, and I still have not received a definitive "Yes" or "No" regarding client engagement. I expected much better communication and professional courtesy from a firm of this supposed caliber.

reviews.text:
Chris Clark of Clark, Smith & Sizemore LLC

I met Mr. Clark when my attorney asked to him to join the team regarding my case. I knew that if Trey Ennis from Trey Ennis Law wanted him to be part of the team he was going to be special.

Chris Clark introduced himself to me stating Trey had asked him to join the team.  I must admit, Chris is a very knowledgeable, and powerful attorney with years of experience and I was very relieved to have him on my team.  Chris laid out everything in regards to my case and went into detail of every part the the case.  He answered any questions and even gave answers to questions I didn't even think of asking.  Chris was very thoughtful and caring and assured me that I was not at fault and the injuries I received were devastating to my body. Even with surgery I received, those body parts will never be the same as before the accident.
He is straight forward about the case and what the expectations would be for every scenario that would occur during the process. Chris has a wonderful staff.  They helped out in the process.  Communication is everything to someone who is not able to navigate the legalities of this process.  When things are not understandable to a person, Chris was able to break it down so I would understand what was happening at that moment and what to expect at each of the meetings. This calmed my apprehension and I was able to think clearly without fear. I am so thankful for his part of this battle, his abilities and smooth approach were outstanding. His leadership and guidance made me feel so secure and at ease. I can assure you that choosing Chris Clark as your attorney will be the best choice you could ever make.

Thank you Chris Clark and staff!
Excellent Service

Thank you so much Angie, Rick, and Chris for all that you did for me. This legal team is so amazing. They helped me through a terrible tragedy. They cried with me, laughed with me , but most of all fought for me. I will forever carry the support they showed to me in my heart. ♥️

Our firm co-counseled with Chris Clark on a Macon medical malpractice case. Chris is a compassionate and knowledgeable partner. His assistant, Jo Lee, is a gem with excellent attention to detail. I would recommend them without reservation to those looking for counsel on a serious injury matter in and around the Macon area.

I would like to recommend this firm. Lizzie Clark was very professional and she kept me informed throughout the process. Although she was not able to take my case, I am still satisfied. About 6 months ago she recommended my father’s case to someone and that firm has been a great help to our family.

Chris Clark did a great job for me on my case. I am very pleased with the attention he provided, his quick response, and excellent results. He and his team are stellar. I absolutely recommend him to friends and family!

My wife was in a terrible accident, and to make a long story short almost lost her foot on a couple of different occasions. After several surgeries and painful recoveries, someone gave us the name of Mr. Chris Clark. Neither my wife or I had ever filed a lawsuit (I had never even spoke to a lawyer in my life, so it’s safe to say we were lost).  From the moment we walked into the office we felt welcomed and knew we made the right choice. Chris was very honest and forthright from the very beginning. He told us we had a legitimate case, but it would be tough because the State of Georgias laws are not set up in favor of a claim like we had. There were many moving parts to our claim. After the meeting he decided to take the case on. From that point forward there was never any doubt in our minds that our case was taken very seriously and professionally. Angie was in constant contact with us updating us on everything that was going on and why it was happening. She was absolutely phenomenal with the way she was patient, compassionate, thorough, knowledgeable and professional! During deposition, both Chris and Angie did wonderful, top-notch work explaining and educating us what was going on and what to expect. When it came time for mediation, this is where we actually got to SEE Chris in action and I’m here to tell you, this man, was all business and he wouldn’t accept anything that wasn’t fair. Towards the end he started a conversation with us and the compassionate side of him was on display. He truly CARED about us and fought very, very hard for us. Chris cared more for my wife’s health than he did about winning anything, and that was just the greatest thing I could ever ask for. I could/would not recommend Chris, Angie and the entire team at Clark, Smith and Sizemore any more! I’m disappointed that it only allows 5 stars, because they deserve 10! If you need a lawyer, Mr. Chris Clark is your guy, without a doubt! Thank you for being here for my family during a very difficult time! Keep up the great work!!!

It was truly a blessing to get to know such an amazing team of people, which calmed my nerves everyday. You can't go wrong with them. They are like family now. Anjie was outstanding and very thorough with her work and even though I never got to meet or talk to Chris his work does not go without question. He really wanted more for me and my family and I really needed a great team behind me at such a difficult time in mine. Thanks to all for your honesty and hard work and dedication towards me when I was going through so much. I will never forget you guys and keep up the great work.

Lisa Hill

I never thought I would have made such a bond with a lawyer, but Chris Clark is just that special. He is absolutely the smartest lawyer you could hire, but he is also the kindest and most sincere man as well. Losing my husband was the most tragic life event, but I felt genuinely cared for by Chris and Jolee, his amazing paralegal, both legally and emotionally as well. They became my extended family throughout the entire legal process. He was patient with me and my many questions. I will honestly miss seeing them. Good good people! Do not hesitate to start a conversation. You will be thankful you did. I am immensely thankful for how my case was ultimately settled.
Very thankful for Chris Clark and his team! They always made me feel like family and gave me great guidance in a very difficult time.

I would recommend them unreservedly to anyone!  Thanks!

reviews.text:
I am extremely disappointed and saddened by the behavior of this company. I am a disabled military veteran who proudly served my country in the United States Air Force and one of the key things I loved about serving is our core values… “Integrity First”; the quality of being honest. Sadly, this company was not honest with me, and it is my duty to share my experience because I do not want this to happen to anyone else.
I had an injury and sought legal counsel and decided to go with Camber & Associates/Injury Accident Lawyers. The main reason I decided to go with this legal agency is because they informed me, I would be able to receive medical treatment at a private Ortho doctor that they partnered with, and they would cover the cost utilizing the funds I would receive at the end of the case. A little over a month later I spoke with Alisa Bevers from CM1 team, and she informed me they were no longer representing me but insured me they would only cover the treatment cost at the private doctor they recommended up until the date (01/23/23) they informed me they were withdrawing from my file. So, I discontinued and cancelled all of the appointments with the private doctor at Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians immediately when I hung up the phone and I did not attend any further appointments with them after that call. Prior to this call I was told I had a case but during this call I was informed that they felt there was not enough evidence. At this time my concern was that I would not be left with a bill from this private doctor and Alisa Bevers assured me I would not. Today is 04/22/23 and I have received a bill in the mail for $5,455.82 from Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians for the time that I was treated. Cambre & Associates/Injury & Accident Lawyers did not take care of this bill as they stated.

I work with this firm and they are excellent and extremely professional. I always know they are going to be fully prepared and they know how to serve clients. I'm very thankful that I get to work with this firm.  Jon Hawk

I recently had the privilege of working with Attorney Lars Anderson, and I cannot express enough how grateful I am for his exceptional legal support. From the very beginning, Attorney Anderson exhibited a level of kindness and helpfulness that immediately put me at ease during a difficult time.

Throughout the entire legal process, Attorney Anderson's expertise and professionalism were evident. He consistently displayed a strong attention to detail, leaving no stone unturned when it came to strategizing and presenting my case. His dedication and diligence were truly remarkable.

I should add my partner was a corporate attorney in Manhattan and San Francisco, so we know many others who have been or still are at all the top firms in the world (Dewey, Clifford Chance, Dechert, etc), and know that this is a small firm in a small town (so plenty of time on their hands comparatively, they aren’t pulling 100 hour weeks).

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. For clarity, our office did return your call as a follow up. During that return call, the conversation ended before our office manager was able to address your inquiry further. At no time did our firm intentionally disconnect or hang up on you.

While our firm does charge a consultation fee, payment of that fee does not guarantee representation, as we are not able to accept every matter presented to us. We strive to communicate this clearly and to treat all individuals who contact our office with professionalism and respect. We regret that this interaction did not allow for a productive discussion and wish you the best moving forward.

He always made himself available to speak when I came forward with questions about my case.

Michael is a trustworthy attorney who was clearly more motivated to get fair terms for me in my case than he was to put charges on my account. I had begun to feel my case was hopeless until I hired Michael. He was true to his word through the whole process. He told me he’d get a settlement and he did, even when I didn’t think it was possible. He was respectful dealing on all sides, but for me it mattered most how he was respectful of fathers’ rights and the importance of quality representation for both parents in the family court system. It is not easy to find someone who can break through the b.s. and settle with fair terms for a father.

And thanks to Justin Combs with the firm who also helped keep me informed and was all over file prep and communication. Thank you, Justin.

So...where do I start?  Admittedly, I made the mistake of joining a "legal services" organization who referred this Law Firm to me for use in the Macon Georgia area.  After first contact with their extremely long winded and narrow eared legal assistant (Is that a nice was of saying secretary?) wherein I ended the conversation trying to speak over her to let her know that their firms services were no longer desired, I received a call from one of the partners in what I can only describe as a ridiculously lame and somewhat humerus attempt at a flash back to the playground at 3:00 P.M. tough guy act...really?  Like the world needs another telephone tough guy?  I spent my entire career surrounded by the most professional and "tough" litigators that the industry has to offer, a poser isn't hard to spot.  The icing on the cake was that he not only attempted to chastise me for the way I handled his assistant, he also accused me of telling her that his firm was incompetent, a thought that hadn't quite crossed my mind as of yet (the focus was really unprofessional at that point) but after quick consideration, seemed to fit.  Let me make one thing clear, I do not mince words, nor do I sugar coat the pills I handout if needed, you sir, are the one that introduced that word into that ridiculous equation.  This firm knows nothing of customer service and was no help to me whatsoever.  I would suggest that if one you out there are looking for professional legal help, this may not be the best place to stop looking.  Cheers

reviews.text:
We engaged Brad Wilson for a very complicated situation involving Executors of  Wills and Estates, Irrevocable Trusts, Property Titles and Deeds.  Financial Debt, left to family members.

This was a very emotional and sensitive time for our family where Brad’s expertise and patience’s were very much appreciated.

Brad was efficient and communicated effectively in way we could understand what path was best for us to proceed.  Brad also has several people in his office working with him that helped out if he was not available.  The majority of the time Brad was available by phone when I called and if not he promptly communicated when he would call back to connect.

Brad was professional and knowledgeable about the laws and  timely sending documents and representing us and dealing with the other attorney.

At the end of the process we were satisfied with the services Brad and his firm provided and would highly recommend his services to anyone looking for an attorney who wants results.  We give Brad 5 stars.  JB

I needed legal advise regarding the passing of my sister, who resided in Perry, Georgia. reviews.text:
My wife and I recently completed the adoption of our son, and we couldn’t have asked for a more meaningful or positive experience. From start to finish, it was smooth, compassionate, and handled with the utmost care. We were represented by Mark Usher from the Macon office, and from the very first conversation, he was exceptional. His communication was clear and consistent, and it was evident that he truly cared—not just about the process, but about us as people and about what was best for the child.

What meant the most was that we never once felt like just another case on his desk. Mark took a genuine personal interest in our family and guided us with both urgency and professionalism. When our court day arrived, it became even clearer how much this meant to him. As the judge signed the Order of Adoption, Mark stood beside us, eyes full of tears and joy, saying that moments like this were the very best part of his job. It’s something we’ll never forget.

After leaving the courthouse, we stopped by the office, and the warmth continued. Angela, the paralegal who had been incredible throughout the process, greeted us with smiles and congratulations. Another attorney, Ashley Seymour—though not directly involved in our case—came over just to celebrate with us, as did Ashley Brodie. The entire Macon office knew what we were working toward and joined in our joy. It was touching to see how invested everyone was. None of them were ever too busy or too important to share in that moment with us.

We sincerely hope we won’t need an attorney again anytime soon (😂), but if we ever do, we know exactly where to turn. This isn’t just a great law firm—it’s a group of truly good people who care deeply about their clients and the lives they’re helping to shape.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your adoption story. It was an absolute honor for our team to be a part of such a meaningful chapter in your family’s life. Mark Usher’s dedication to each client by making sure families feel seen, supported, and celebrated is something we’re deeply proud of.

We’re also grateful you felt that same care and joy from the entire Brodie Law Group team. Your words beautifully reflect exactly what we strive for: not just legal representation, but a team that truly cares.

From all of us at Brodie Law Group - thank you for letting us be a small part of such a big moment. 💙

reviews.text:
I was assigned Sarah Riedel as conflict counsel after I declared a conflict with the public defender’s office. Unfortunately, her representation left me feeling abandoned and betrayed.

Despite knowing the facts of my case — including a defective probable cause affidavit, prosecutorial misconduct, ex parte communications between the ADA and judge, and evidence suppression — Ms. Riedel filed no motions, raised no objections, and failed to advocate on my behalf.

She also did not challenge judicial bias when the court refused to accept my pro se filings, leaving me in a constitutional vacuum where I had no attorney acting for me and was not permitted to represent myself.

Her silence in the face of these issues gave the appearance of collusion with the prosecution and the court, rather than loyalty to her client. Instead of defending me, she appeared to stand aside so that the State’s objectives could proceed unchallenged.

The Sixth Amendment guarantees not just the presence of an attorney, but a loyal advocate. I did not have that in Ms. Riedel. My experience with her was one of inaction, silence, and ineffective assistance, and it contributed directly to the pressure I felt to plead guilty simply to move forward.

She also perjured herself in testimony. She is probably one of the worst attorneys in the Oconee Judicial Circuit.

She knew the Judge Sarah Wall and DA Tim Vaughn and ADA Brad Childers were acting corruptly and she chose to remain silent.

SHE WILL NOT ADVOCATE FOR YOU, EVER.  If you need an attorney who will actually fight for you, I cannot recommend her.

She is very good she fought for me and my mom years ago when she was first starting out and she won it for us very thorough I will always use me Sarah if I ever need her for any thing thanks Sarah its Julia Leverette donna nesmiths daughter y'all try her out if you ever need a good lawyer

I received a letter from Sarah Riedel a year and a half after my divorce was final demanding that I allow my ex husband to come to my house and retrieve items from my home. She was not involved in the original divorce settlement and I had an off duty police officer on my property when he removed all belongings that was awarded him in the divorce decree and the off duty police officer had signed off on this. The letter was demanding and gave me 10 days to respond. Without knowing this case and what had already transpired I was at a loss as to why she was demanding me to allow an ex husband access to my home when he was not allowed unsupervised entry a year and a half earlier when the divorce was finalized.

Upon contacting my original attorney in my divorce case I was advised ignore this request and throw this letter in the trash.

If it was warranted that I was holding the ex husband's possession then why had he not contacted his attorney who represented him in the divorce?

Very unprofessional and Sarah Riedel should have researched this before sending a demanding letter to a settled Divorce case.

I would never recommend this firm to anyone.

I was referred to this law office by John Morrison, but my experience has been extremely disappointing. However, when I followed up, I was informed that another person would need to handle my case and that they would contact me within 24 hours. It has now been a week, and I have yet to receive any communication from them.

The lack of follow-through and professionalism displayed by this law office is unacceptable. What's even more disheartening is the apparent racial discrimination I experienced during this process, despite the fact that my money is just as good as anyone else's. Discrimination has no place in any professional setting.

I strongly advise against seeking services from anyone at this law office based on my experience. Customer service and fair treatment should be fundamental principles in the legal profession, and unfortunately, this office falls short in both aspects.

When my son was facing an  unsubstantiated felony charge, our entire family was overwhelmed with fear and uncertainty about his future.  We knew we would need exceptional legal representation, and we prayed earnestly for God to lead us to the right attorney.  Those prayers were answered beyond measure when we were led to this firm.

From our very first consultation, we knew we were in capable hands.  The attorney and his staff took the time to listen to our situation, asked detailed questions and began developing a defense.  Their legal knowledge and expertise was evident, but what truly stood out was their genuine compassion for my son and our family during this incredibly difficult time .

The entire staff was remarkable.  Every phone call was answered or returned , every email answered, and we never felt just like another case number.  They treated my son with dignity and respect and always maintained a professional, yet warm demeanor that put us at ease

The outcome speaks volumes for itself:  what began as a felony charge that could have derailed my son’s future was reduced to a misdemeanor.  This result will allow him to move forward with his career goals and life without the devastating consequences of a felony conviction.  The relief and gratitude our family feels cannot be adequately expressed in words .

Beyond the legal victory , this attorney and his staff gave us something far more valuable during a dark time for our family:  hope.  They believed in my son when he struggled to believe in himself.  They remained steadfast and confident when we were consumed with worry.

We firmly believe that God placed this law office in our path as an answer to our prayers.  The combination of exceptional legal skill and genuine compassion made all the difference in my son’s case and life .

If you or someone you love is facing criminal charges ,  I cannot recommend this firm highly enough.

We are grateful for their extraordinary service, their integrity and for treating my son like he mattered .  They truly are a blessing, and we will never forget what they’ve done for our family !

I hired Mr Bushway to represent me for some major felony charges that threatened to take me from my family for quite a long time. I was still incarcerated when I retained Mr. Bushway, and had been denied bond due to being from Florida. Mr bushway worked with my family’s budget, and allowed us to make payments on the total balance. Within a week of retaining Mr bushway, he not only got me a bond hearing, but got my bond approved, and set at a reasonable price. I was able to get out and get back to work. Shortly after, I was arrested in Florida on some unrelated charges, and I had to serve 2 years in Florida prisons. When I was arrested, I had not finished paying Mr bushway, and he had every single right to drop my case, due to my new arrest and my failure to complete payments. Not only did he inform the courts of my situation, and stop them from putting out warrants, he waited until my release and my first court date after being released from Florida DOC, Mr bushway was able to get the worst of my charges dismissed, and time served on the rest. Mr Bushway was able to get my case resolved in a way I never would have imagined, and he did all of this without even knowing for sure when I would finish the last payment. This goes to show you his true character and his immense compassion for his fellow humans. He cared more about getting me the best possible outcome, than he did getting the rest of his money. And yes, I did pay him immediately after court, because that is how he makes a living, and he deserves so much more than I can even begin to offer.
Mr Bushway did his absolute best for me, and he fought for my freedom. He is absolutely the best choice for a defense lawyer, and also an amazing human being. Thank you Mr Bushway, and god bless you always!

They served as the Closing Attorney for two properties that we purchased in Macon, assisted us with getting our legal documents in line with GA standards, etc.  Each time we visit their office or speak with them via phone, every individual there  goes out of their way to be as helpful and friendly as possible. I liked them so much that I even invited them to my wedding! That should be a testament to how good they are at making you feel like family. I look forward to many, many more closings with this exemplary staff.

In 2023, I was referred to Lisenby & Associates by a professional colleague regarding corporate legal guidance and support.  Their commitment to efficiency, responsiveness, and clear communication was evident from the outset.  From contract guidance to drafting NDA's to HR questions, they were consistently timely and kept me well informed throughout the entire process.

Beyond their impressive efficiency, the firm's dedication to client care was truly noteworthy.  Blake and Lauren have provided clear and concise explanations of every step, addressing any questions or concerns I had with a patient and professional demeanor.

We are pleased to continue partnering with their firm and would happily recommend them to our professional colleagues.

My first closing experience at Lisenby was exceptional! The atmosphere and staff were amazing, creating a truly memorable experience. The office ambiance gives clients a "Happy Closing Day" feel, with luxury, friendliness, and great hospitality. It's the perfect setting for such a significant investment. I'll definitely be back!

Living in Tucker, I wanted a local firm I could trust. Frank and Nick were professional, responsive, and caring.
After my car accident in Peachtree Corners, Frank made sure I understood every step. Nick was always quick to respond and very supportive.
My accident happened near downtown Marietta, and I had never worked with a lawyer before. Frank made the process easy, and Nick made sure nothing slipped through the cracks.
I was rear-ended in traffic near Perimeter Mall. Frank Evans handled my case professionally, and Nick kept communication clear throughout.
I was involved in a multi-car accident near Norcross. Frank broke everything down so I could understand it, and Nick stayed in touch consistently.
After my accident, the insurance company kept calling and pressuring me. Once Frank stepped in, that stopped immediately. Nick kept me updated so I never felt out of the loop.
Nick was great at checking in and reminding me about appointments. Frank made sure the insurance company didn’t take advantage of me.

I was involved in a rideshare accident as a passenger. Everything was confusing—two insurers, the rideshare company, and medical bills. Frank navigated all of it like a true expert. I’m so thankful for his guidance.
Frank Evans is hands down the best attorney I’ve ever worked with. From start to finish, he treated me like a person, not a file. He was patient, informative, and genuinely invested in my recovery.
Nick deserves 10 stars. He checked in regularly, reminded me of appointments, and walked me through forms I didn’t understand. Amazing case manager.

I was in a multi-car accident and didn’t know who was at fault or what to do next. Frank broke it down for me step by step, ensured I understood my options, and handled all the paperwork and negotiations.
My slip-and-fall case was complicated, but Frank Evans stayed patient. Even when things dragged on, he kept me in the loop and fought for a fair outcome.
I’m not the type to leave reviews, but Frank Evans really impressed me. From the first consult to the final settlement, he made me feel like I mattered.
I had a scary trucking accident south of Atlanta. The paperwork was overwhelming, but Frank Evans took it all off my plate. He kept me updated and fought until I got what I needed.
Slipped at a restaurant in Midtown and hurt my ankle. Other firms didn’t call back, but Evans’ office answered right away. The whole process was smooth and I actually felt listened to.

I got hit by UPS truck and I didn’t know what to do. My insurance told me that I needed to call the other insurance and have them fix my car. I got confused until I found attorney Frank who helped me with my case.

Recently gave them a call, had a bunch of questions. They were super helpful super patient.
Great business. I would recommend them for everyone.

reviews.text: I absolutely enjoyed working with this company! They had great communication throughout the whole process even when I thought they forgot about me. Everyone is very consistent throughout and worked very diligently to get me what I deserve from my car accident. They even have a tracker that shows you where you are in the process such as disbursement, treatment, and etc to stay up to date without having to talk to someone. After everything was said and done the team reached out to me in regards to my disbursement and everything was explained clear and they don’t mind questions because I am one to definitely ask lots of questions especially since this is my first time dealing with this. I chose a pickup time to pickup my check and the office was very very nice! They have a fridge dedicated just for guests, coffee, tee, snack bar, fruits/cheeses and even have a variety of stuff in the fridge like different types of milk, water (flavored and regular), and even sodas. The whole set up was nice and appreciate everyone here. If I had ever get into another jam, I will definitely be coming back here!

She made me feel supported during one of the most stressful times of my life and kept me informed every step of the way. She worked hard to make sure everything was handled properly and that my case was settled right on time.

Mr. Carter exemplified superb listening skills, compassion, empathy and his follow-up and follow through was simply impeccable. I am a firm believer that who a business, company, etc has on their "front lines" of their business representing them can do 1 of two things Make the business and company stronger, better and more efficient or destroy and tear down a company and business from the way they are conducting themselves and representing the company they are employed with and for me, Mr. Carter truly out shines and rank them all - it is my hope that Attorney McCain knows what an asset he has in Mr. Carter and the way Mr. Carter interacts on the phone with me truly helped me and although Attorney McCain wasn't able to be the one to assist me with my case, I felt it necessary to make my post of my phone interaction and experience with Mr. Carter and say, "Thank You Mr. Carter, May GOD bless and keep you and your family always."

Christy takes her job very seriously and has learned a drive commercial trucks herself in her quest to get a full understanding for all of the variables that are specific to trucking cases.

Christy is also one of the most brilliant and creative litigators in the country.  If you are up against a powerful trucking company, either as a victim of someone else's negligence or as an attorney with a trucking case in need of help from a trucking specialist, you can't go wrong with Christy and her team. I was involve in an automobile accident two years ago and had no idea what to do.

I was directed to Childers and McCain through a Google search (Yes, I used Google). I consulted with Mrs. Childers initially, who informed me she and Mrs. Hannah Gabriel would like to meet me. I was shocked when they stated they would drive all the way from Macon, GA to Atlanta, GA just to meet with me .

During our meeting they reassured me everything was going to be okay and all I had to do was focus on getting healthy.  Mrs. Gabriel who worked on my case, was exceptional throughout the entire process. She constantly updated me about my case (I never had to call because she frequently phoned and e-mail me).  In addition, I was also given welfare checks asked about my health.  They were very empathic to my issues and always informed me I had nothing to worry about.

I never had to worry about anything pertaining to my case and that was important to me.  I was stress free!!!!

When Mrs. Hannah concluded my cause I would like to say I was shocked at what she was able to do. SHE GOT RESULTS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I was literally at lost for words (no exaggeration).

I just want to thank her and the team that worked on my case. They were always willing to answers all my questions and explain things further if I was perplex. This review is very simple in comparison to what they did for me.
Again, if you want attorneys who are compassionate, highly knowledgeable, please consider Childers & McClain, LLC.

Mrs. Gabriel you are a rock star and I appreciate everything you did for me.

reviews.ownerResponse: I'm sorry -- I understand that your feelings were hurt because I didn't return your call. I understand your disappointment. I am a solo practitioner, which means that I am the only lawyer in my firm, and since covid, I am the only employee of my law firm. It's simply not possible for me to return every call I receive from people who need services that I am unable to provide. Frankly, I think many businesses are in a similar position, and I, too, find it frustrating when, for instance,  a doctor's office doesn't return my call to inquire if they are accepting new patients. Unfortunately,  I am only accepting a limited number of cases until after the New Year 2024. I do hope you find the right attorney for your case. It's not me, but I know there is someone who will be a great fit. Best of luck-- Lauren

I highly recommend Mr. Sedghi as one of the best criminal defense lawyers in Macon and Middle Georgia. He is exceptionally smart, thorough, and dedicated to defending his clients in any way possible. I’ve personally received invaluable legal advice from him, and his insight, approach, and professionalism have been consistently impressive. He has also worked closely with my lawyers in other states to develop a comprehensive legal strategy that works. In addition to criminal defense, Reza has extensive experience in personal injury cases and medical malpractice. His experience and commitment to fight for his clients’ rights truly set him apart. If you’re looking for a lawyer who genuinely cares and will provide the best possible defense, Reza Sedghi is the one to trust.

During a recent consultation at the law firm regarding an incident that took place in a town three hours away from my location, I encountered a mix of experiences with the staff present. The front desk personnel and paralegals showcased professionalism, courtesy, and efficiency, providing me with a seamless and pleasant experience from the outset.

Regrettably, the interaction with the attorney assigned to my case fell short of expectations. Despite my attempts to convey my situation, I felt unheard and dismissed during our consultation. The attorney, who mentioned being located 45 minutes away from the town of the incident, continually highlighted the potential costs of his services without offering a clear quotation. His repeated emphasis on expenses being deemed "too high" for me, given the distance, left me feeling undervalued as a prospective client.

The lack of attentiveness and transparency in discussing the fee structure and services offered by the attorney eclipsed the positive experience with the support staff. Although I did not hire the attorney, this encounter underscored the significance of effective communication, transparency, and a client-centered approach in legal consultations.

While the law firm's front desk and paralegals demonstrated exceptional professionalism and customer service, earning a perfect score of 10/10 for their outstanding performance, the disappointing consultation with the attorney serves as a reminder of the importance of a client-focused approach in legal services.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are disappointed to read your comments in regard to Mr. Yazinski.  As you stated, Mr. Yazinski is no longer with our firm.  However, in reviewing the matter, we note that he won your case.  Additionally, it appears that he had to spend a great deal of time and effort in successfully representing you through both the administrative process and, ultimately Federal District Court, to obtain a favorable decision.  From your prior correspondence, it seems you were happy with his representation.  However, it appears that you are now upset with the fact that Mr. Yazinski has filed a fee petition. He is legally entitled to petition the Social Security Administration so that it may determine, within the parameters of its rules, fair compensation for his representation of you in this matter.  This process is vital in helping to ensure that claimants, such as yourself, continue to receive expert representation and the best opportunity to obtain social security disability benefits. If we can address any other concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us directly.

reviews.text:
Astute, tenacious, and strategic—these are just a few of the many qualities that immediately come to mind when describing Ms. Wilkerson as my lawyer. I cannot recommend her highly enough, nor can I fully express how satisfied I am with her representation.
I hired Ms. Wilkerson to represent me in family court against an opposing counsel and party that was exceedingly aggressive and divisive, far beyond what I had anticipated. Through prayer and the grace of God, I was led to her, and she proved to be exactly what I needed during one of the most challenging times of my life.
From the very beginning, Ms. Wilkerson demonstrated an exceptional level of competence and professionalism that far exceeded my expectations. She was sharp, thorough, and always well-prepared. Her meticulous research ensured that every necessary motion was filed, and every critical aspect of my case was addressed with precision, and might I add, properly cited with applicable laws and precedents. Her profound knowledge of the law was evident in her measured, strategic approach, allowing her to advocate assertively on my behalf while considering the bigger picture and life beyond the final hearing.
Another one of Ms. Wilkerson’s most impressive qualities was her ability to use my time efficiently. Every meeting was focused and productive, leaving me informed, prepared, and confident for court. Her communication was exceptional—open, clear, and honest. She answered all my questions with patience and ensured I fully understood every step of the process.
In court, her presentation was masterful—clear, articulate, and unwavering. She ensured my defense was bold yet appropriately measured, leaving no room for doubt. Beyond her legal expertise, Ms. Wilkerson provided invaluable coaching and guidance, helping me feel empowered and confident during a time when I felt anything but.
Her balanced approach was particularly reassuring, as she always made decisions with both immediate outcomes and long-term consequences in mind. Ms. Wilkerson’s discernment and dedication to doing the work were unparalleled.
Brilliantly skilled, assertive when needed, and unfailingly professional, Ms. Wilkerson turned what could have been an overwhelming experience into a manageable process. I am deeply grateful for her support and feel an immense sense of relief knowing she was by my side.
If you’re looking for an outstanding divorce lawyer, look no further. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Wilkerson to anyone in need of exceptional representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Michelle. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!

reviews.text: The entire Legal Industrial Complex should be overhauled. I paid this firm $3690 on 9/2024. After attending a hearing for 15 mins and useless emails, calls, and texts, the balance is $107 without another court appearance. I requested a withdrawal from the case on Nov 22nd but they waited until Dec 2nd to inform me about signing a release form. From 11/22- 12/9 2024 they continued working the case(against my will) and running the bill up. I argued my own case in court and saved a ton of money. Paying an attorney an upfront fee only exposes the client to be taken advantage of as in this case. There are many positive experiences here but I had to make potential vulnerable divorce clients aware of my experience. They will run the bill up by calling, texting, and emailing the same document. I would send them a document to review before a phone conversation so they could be prepared but instead the attorney would not be familiar and run the bill up by asking useless questions that were covered in the document sent earlier. Stay away from attorneys if you can help it.

reviews.text:
I was in an automobile accident in August 2021. I received a very agreeable settlement in August 2025 (to the tune of five times more than an initial offer following the event). While some may wonder what took so long (medicine and healing isn't always quick), I can honestly say it was handled in a timely and professional manner at every step by David Mann and his firm. Despite physical recovery and mental frustration I knew my lawyer was on my side and looking after my needs.

At every step, from introductions to deposition to settlement, I was treated as a priority and looked after with a personal caring and understanding. I cannot vouch for the big name firms, but there is something to be said for local service and community members looking after each other. I'm hoping I never have to leave another review for something like this, but should I need to I will be contacting David again. The big teams are fantastic I am sure, but I don't need them as Mann Law Firm is my go-to in the Macon area.

reviews.text: I will not recommend this law firm to anyone. This law firm does not deserve the one star I left. Mr. Mann is one of the most deceptive and cunning attorneys I have ever crossed paths with. I hired this law firm to handle a worker's compensation claim because I was injured on my job and then fired right after. Mr. Mann assured me that he could handle this case. After a year and a half and  two weeks before my  scheduled court date this attorney decided to withdraw from my case. He didn't even have the decency to email me or call me to tell me his intentions. Instead I received a call from the opposing counsel that Mr. Mann had withdrew from my case. I feel like it was a conspiracy between Mr. Mann and the opposing counsel to destroy my case. Not only that but Mr. Mann allowed the opposing counsel to set my court date off over five times. Normal attorney client cases don't work this way. I was not sent to a doctor by the opposing counsel or by my own attorney. Instead I was mislead for almost 2 years and dragged along on a deceptive mission to irrevocably destroy my case. I have sound reason to believe that my worker's compensation case was deliberately savataged by Mr. Mann and the opposing counsel. However, I will not disclose this here. I can only strongly warn anyone who is thinking of hiring this law firm to run.
Let's just say Mrs Gayle is not going down without a fight! Thanks so much.
The staff and Mr Mann are great they made me feel like I made the right decision. Thanks

This review is for Carol Pratts, Paralegal, RN, with Katherine L McArthur Law Firm, 6055 Lakeside Commons Dr., Suite 400, Macon, GA 31210. I called the law office to see if I had grounds to file a Medical Malpractice Suit based on Patient Abandonment. After Carol took all of my information, she said she would submit it to their team, and the team would review her notes, and if Mrs. McArthur thought she could win my lawsuit suit some someone would get back in touch with me. I was also impressed that Mrs. McArthur had hired Carol as a nurse because I think a nurse would be better at asking questions relating to a Medical Malpractice lawsuit because of Carol's extensive education, experience, and background in nursing and medicine.

If you are looking for a professional, reliable, considerate, and experienced Law Firm, look no further than Carol, Paralegal, RN, with Katherine L. McArthur Law Firm. reviews.text:
My mother is in the ICU right now with Doctors playing turf war with her life and refusing Medical Accommodations that can help save her life.  I contacted Katherine McArthur and presented my case for  18 minutes this morning and was subsequently given a call back that displayed incredible disregard for my Situation Legally and an ignorance of Patient's Rights Laws.  I was basically told our law firm can't help you unless she dies or something goes terribly wrong.  Avoid.

**UPDATE** = My Reply to their Response
The firm's response proves my point exactly. They admit they "cannot provide immediate intervention" - which is precisely what families in medical crisis need.
I didn't ask them to "direct medical decisions." I asked for what any competent patient rights attorney should provide: call hospital legal to pressure them into honoring my mother's written request for standard-of-care treatment, or advise on emergency injunctive relief.
Their response reveals their business model: wait until the patient is harmed or dead, THEN pursue a malpractice case for damages. They have zero interest in preventing harm - only in profiting from it after the fact.
"We cannot provide immediate intervention" = "We don't help until something goes terribly wrong"
That's not patient advocacy. That's ambulance chasing.
Other attorneys DO handle real-time medical rights cases. This firm chooses not to - whether from ignorance of the law or unwillingness to do the work.
Fortunately, through persistent self-advocacy (no thanks to this firm), I secured my mother's IR consultation. But families facing similar crises deserve to know: this firm will not help you while your loved one is still alive and fighting. They'll only help after they're dead or something terrible goes wrong due to their failure to advocate within the bounds of the law.
Choose accordingly.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are very sorry to hear about your mother’s situation and understand how stressful this must be for you. Our law firm provides free case evaluations for potential medical malpractice claims, but under Georgia law, these cases require a detailed review process and specific legal criteria before we can proceed. Unfortunately, we cannot provide immediate intervention in hospital disputes, as we are not authorized to direct medical decisions.

As you know, we never represented you or your mother, and your only contact with us was to inquire whether we could help, and unfortunately, we could not. Our intake team followed the standard process by explaining these limitations and offering to have a nurse review your case. We regret that this did not meet your expectations, but please know that our goal is always to provide accurate legal guidance within the bounds of the law.

UPDATE: We understand how difficult and urgent your situation must have felt, and we truly empathize with families facing medical crises. However, our firm focuses on medical malpractice cases under Georgia law, which require specific legal criteria and a thorough review process before we can act. We are not legally permitted to intervene in hospital decisions or provide emergency injunctive relief during ongoing treatment.

Our intake team explained these limitations and offered to have a nurse review your case at no cost, which is the standard process for all potential claims.

While other types of attorneys may handle real-time patient rights advocacy, that is outside the scope of our practice. Our goal is to provide accurate legal guidance within the bounds of the law, not to give false hope or act outside our authority.

We regret that this did not meet your expectations and wish you and your family the best moving forward.

The entire team at McArthur Law Firm was equally impressive. Their staff was courteous, responsive, and always ready to assist, making us feel like a top priority. Communication was prompt, transparent, and thorough, ensuring we were informed and supported at every step. It’s rare to encounter a firm that combines such warmth with such remarkable skill.

Michael and McArthur Law Firm went above and beyond, advocating for us with unwavering commitment and delivering an outcome that was nothing short of phenomenal. They are the epitome of excellence in legal representation, and we are immensely grateful for their incredible work. If you’re looking for an attorney and firm that will treat your case with the utmost care and deliver exceptional results, Michael Thompson and McArthur Law Firm are the absolute best choice.

-The Barnhill Family

reviews.text: I consulted Ms Haskins regarding available asset protections when initially preparing to transition my mother from private pay nursing home care to Medicaid. Aware or not, she absolutely failed to inform me of the legal asset transfers readily available. She mentioned only the primary residence transfer. In my opinion, Ms Haskins failed to provide competent legal advice in a practice area she advertised as one of her specialties. My financial losses were significant.

reviews.text: Attorney Tracey Dellacona, represented me in a medical case involving a negligent doctor who misdiagnosed me.   Due to the doctor’s negligence, I lost both of my breast.  Attorney Dellacona served as my counsel and from the first second I met her I knew she was a fireball and would never back down fighting for me.  Although the opposing attorneys tried to delay the case, Tracey Dellacona was not about to let that happen.  She said justice delayed is justice denied and trust me, she knew exactly how to get the case rolling and not allow delay antics.  I received my settlement and would like to thank her and her competent office staff collectively for the hard work and excellent results that ensued. I witnessed this highly intelligent, mild talking attorney, turn into a bulldog while fighting for me.   Attorney Tracey Dellacona definitely knows how to deal with doctors, insurance companies and attorneys, better than I had ever hoped for.  This traumatic event changed me, and it changed me forever but the settlement I received will go a very long way toward my future and my children’s future.  Tracey Dellacona thank you from the bottom of my heart.

I am writing a review for The Dellacona Law Firm, because of the long term relationship we built over a 7 ½ year path to closure in our case. In this case we lost a love one that we felt we should not have lost in the manner we lost her. After receiving the death certificate, we were more suspicious. We got Dellcona law firm’s name from someone who had nothing but good things to say about the firm.  After a meeting with Mrs. Dellacona and some back ground investigation on her firm’s part. She said agreed that the circumstance and manner did not match cause of death. 
I said 7 ½ years we may have lost 3 years because of CVID -19, all the court dates and case’s were put on hold and backed up. Even in this time frame when we knew nothing was happening with the case I would call and get an update every month. With this case we had many family members (11) involved, for the most part went through me but the Dellcona law firm had no trouble in keeping us all informed. When there was any question on how we wanted to move forward I as the plaintiff and executor was ask and informed of any issues, and was allowed to make the decision with Tracy’s expert analysis. Tracy and her team had a very friendly and profession demeanor, and at no time did we question Tracy and her commitment to our case. We ended up settling out of court, I think due to the overwhelming evidence and facts that were uncovered by Tracy’s experience, her experts and team. It was the attention to the details that force a settlement out of court in my opinion.  Forever grateful thank you Tracy and team!!!

Tracy Dellacona and the Dellacona Law firm was very thorough and knowledgable while representing me in a negligent death case. Their experience in the medical; malpractice area is exemplary. I highly recommend this firm for any civil case. The results they obtained were above and beyond what I expected.
Ms Tracey, Ms Kim, Ms Amy and Ms Amanda are amazing! I will be forever grateful for what they did for me.

This Law firm was very professional and had all the resources at hand to work all discovery. This ability plus hard work is the reason my case ended in a very positive outcome. During the time my case was being worked, the Dellacona Law Firm keep me apprised of all issues and events and most of all they listened: 
I would defiantly refer them to anyone needing legal service!

I was fortunate to have Matthew Schwartz (Matt) as my attorney representing me.  After meeting with Matt, I was impressed with his professionalism, friendliness, and compassion, putting me at ease given my situation.  He explained each step and kept me informed as he worked my case.  His commitment and perseverance resulted in a favorable outcome.   My experience with him was a positive one.

I would highly recommend Matthew Schwartz. He was very knowledgeable and thorough regarding details of my situation.
He is very courteous and understanding. I would give him 10 stars if I could. Thank you Matt.

The law services I received from Anderson, Walker & Reichert, LLP is through a lawyer in their company, Matthew G. Schwartz. Matt specializes in military law and civil litigation which is why I called him back in 2024 to help me with my VA disability claims. He has truly been instrumental in working with me on how to deal with the Veteran's Administration (VA), guiding me to the correct medical professionals in collecting evidence for my claims, and writing and putting together packages for submission to the VA.

I take pride in knowing that as my lawyer, Matt will always give his best effort in helping me to the max of his ability. Since I hired him in 2024, our success in working together has seen my VA disability go from 0% to 40%!!!! And we are not done yet! I want to thank Anderson, Walker & Reichert, LLP for providing me an amazing lawyer in Matthew G. Schwartz. Thanks Matt, you rock!

Let it be known!

If you are in the DoD (I am Air Force) and you find yourself in need of legal advice or services, these are the people for you!

Matthew Schwartz took my case with only a month prep time and was able to work nothing short of a miracle.

Matt took my case and ran with it. He stayed in contact with me every step of the way and was patient with me when I asked him to explain, explain again, and then explain one more time what the heck the Air Force was saying and doing.

Without Matt in my corner I am convinced that my 20+ year career would have ended terribly and with much dishonor. He took to the time to read review all the material and make sure that everyone involved was well informed to make the correct decisions to bring the nonsense I found myself in to a quick resolve.

I wish I had more words to explain what a great job Matt did, but I am a simple guy that was simply blessed to have someone like Matt in my corner.

I will keep his name and number in my wallet forever and in the event anyone says I need legal advice, his name and number will be the first thing I bring up.

reviews.text:
Knowledgeable, compassionate human being who happens to also be a great lawyer
Recently we were hit with an outrageously frivolous civil lawsuit. As someone who never had any experience with the court system, we had no idea where to start. We only had 3 weeks to hearing and I frantically called every lawyer in town and surrounding area, but everyone was booked or wouldn’t even return the call. A terrifying place to be. I called this firm and I was promptly transferred to Mr. Schwartz. (WOW! A FIRST!) He listened to my story, asked me some details about the case. I emailed him the court papers and some of my supporting evidence. Quite a bit of it too. He took the time to evaluate the case, consult with his partners, and next day agreed to represent us on such a short notice. Due to logistics, we ended up hiring a local lawyer. Mr. Schwartz was extremely gracious when I told him we’ll go with this other person, wished me all the best, and said he would gladly assist me in the future, if the need ever arises. Not a word about his time spent on my behalf or mention of a payment owed to him. The humanity and character of this lawyer was absolutely astounding, especially after going through the despair of not finding any legal help anywhere else. I SO wish he was local!!! I felt comfortable talking to him, I didn’t feel rushed or a burden. He was not condescending, as most lawyers are I find out, but warm, patient, with a healthy dose of humor, which God knows I needed, didn’t make empty promises, but gave me a realistic picture of the process involved. (also a sobering one). Now, that I blew my chance to have him in my court, if I only get lucky enough that he would not represent the plaintiff! That’s how good I think he is. A shout out to all unresponsive lawyers/firms out there: take a lesson from this gentleman on how to treat a potential client in distress. Return the call in a timely manner, even if you won’t take the case: just say so! It’s common courtesy, so we can move on to the next person. In my experience with him, Mr. Schwartz proved to be an absolute 10* first class act. Highly recommend him (just not to my plaintiff…)
Excellent representation with a personal touch. I was very impressed with the level of attention given and expertise demonstrated.

Matthew Schwartz handled a Lawsuit Complaint for me. It was refreshing and reassuring to find an Attorney who actually practiced Law. He listened, researched, and had my best interest at the forefront of his proposed plan. He freely communicated each step of the process with knowledge and confidence following up with me as promised.   Should the need arise, I would not hesitate to call on Matthew again!
Great firm, would recommend Matt Schwartz.

Matt made the process seamless and easy to understand. He was responsive to any question I had and did his utmost to provide accurate and complete information to the investigators. If anyone is ever having an issue with a SOR, I would definitely recommend the contact Matthew G. Schwartz at Anderson, Walker & Reichert for all their needs. Thank you again for everything you have done.

reviews.text:
I know someone that has had a case with this office since April 2024 and it's now October 2025. A County worker for Pulaski County Hawkinsville, Ga was driving a tractor came out into oncoming traffic and hit the individual from the side damaging the car as to where it was totalled she's been going to the chiropractor and still having problems with her back her future medical bills are over $140,00.00 current medical bills are $15,000.00 and that's all the insurance company wants to pay $20,000. $15,000 of it for current medical bills and $5,000 for her pain and suffering.  So how is the attorney going to get paid if they charge 33 percent of settlement? They've called maybe 5 times within these 18 months and when she calls them it takes days sometimes weeks before Corey calls back. He say he sent in for them to pay her current medical bills, future medical bills and pain and suffering it's taken over 3 months to hear they only want to pay $20,000.00 so now he's saying they have to take the case to court to sue the county that has been 2 or weeks ago since he stated that.  Her back is seriously injured that she will need surgery in the future all from someone else's carelessness he ran into the passenger side of her as she was passing by made the car spin out of control
and end up down the road when he was coming off of the dirt road as she was on her way to pick her kids up from school.  I tried not to come to the internet but it's taking to long for the case to be settled and what is $5,000 for pain and suffering when she can't enjoy life as she knows or enjoy activities wit her kids anymore due to her back pain they don't want to pay for her future medical needs pertaining to this case it's not fair nor right. They know she's young and trying to take advantage of the matter.

I was supposed to be picking my husband up yesterday evening but Mr. Fouche never showed up to represent my husband. I do not recommend him. reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. York is correct; I was willing to work with her on payments to represent her husband. She is correct that she made exactly 3 payments. Her initial contact with my office was July 24, 2024, for a court date of July 25, 2024. The name used was Lilac Mitchum. I called her back. On Friday, July 26, 2024, I received a phone message at 4:48 P.M. saying she was supposed to call me yesterday. I returned that call and set up her payments. On Tuesday, July 30, 2024, she said she had not received an email from me to set up the case. The documents she requested were sent on July 31, 2024. Those documents were signed. I filed an Entry of Appearance with the Clerk of Court to let them know I was on the case. I copied the District Attorney's office on that Entry of Appearance. I received phone calls on August 12, 2024, August 14, 2024, and August 21, 2024, and August 22, 2024, which were returned.
I had already downloaded her husband's sentence and other probation information but had not received a notice from the Clerk of Court or the District Attorney's Office. On a Thursday, Ms. York called and said her husband was being released and my services were no longer needed. I refunded what she had paid since it was only 3 payments out of 25 to be made. The following day, Friday, Ms. York called and demanded that I withdraw from the case. She said it was my fault he never got out of jail that Thursday. I contacted the Clerk of Court's office and asked if they had sent a notice for a hearing on Ms. York's husband's case. He advised they do not send out notices, the District Attorney sends out the notices. I was never contacted by the District Attorney's Office for a hearing on his case. I filed a Motion to Withdraw from the case that day. I was contacted by the District Attorney's Office the following Monday and asked if I would be there Thursday for his hearing. I advised them that I had filed to withdraw from the case. If I had received notice to attend court, I would have been there. If an attorney misses a court date and it is clear he received notice and should be there, the judge's office or the Clerk of Court will contact that lawyer and ask them where they are. No one from the judge's office or the Clerk of Court contacted me the day Mr. Mitchum had a hearing. The case was simply continued so I could be notified.

reviews.text: After 2.5 years of patiently waiting, I’m so happy my case has finally been resolved. Never having an auto accident previously, or dealing with any kind of litigation, I had no idea what to expect. 2.5 years felt like a lot of life happening with no resolve and the cloud of all this hanging over me and my family constantly. There seemed to be quite a bit of staff turnover on the team which caused a lot of delay in communication at different points in my time working with F+F, which at times was a little discouraging. That being said, after the initial settlement offer we’d made was countered with a fraction of the amount, my attorney Alex Fadoul worked for over a year to fight for the maximum amount we’d be able to get, and doubled that counter offer. Having brought Amanda Jones on to pick up the pieces left by changes in staff, things were wrapped up cleanly and quickly and I received more than I thought I would by the end. It was a long process, and hard to be patient through the life changes that the whole situation brought on, but I’m happy that this chapter is closed, and happy with Alex and Amanda for taking care of things for me.

I recently had the privilege of working with Attorney Alex at Farah & Farah, and I couldn't be more impressed with the level of service and dedication I received. From start to finish, Alex demonstrated a deep understanding of the law and a commitment to achieving the best possible outcome for me.

One of the things that stood out to me was Alex's attention to detail. They meticulously reviewed every aspect of my case, leaving no stone unturned. This thorough approach not only instilled confidence in me but also led to a favorable resolution.

Moreover, Alex's communication skills are top-notch. They kept me informed at every step of the process, explaining complex legal jargon in a way that was easy to understand. This open line of communication made me feel valued as a client and allowed me to make informed decisions.

In addition to their legal expertise, Alex's professionalism and empathy were truly exceptional. They listened to my concerns with patience and compassion, showing genuine care for my well-being throughout the legal proceedings.
