If we are mistaken about that, of course we are happy to talk with you and hopefully address any negative experience you had with us.  If you have a legal matter to discuss, it is best to call us so we may talk privately.  Thank you.

reviews.text: Mr. Gautreaux recently came to speak with the Mercer Pre-law Society, and we had a great experience dealing with him and his staff. He and his staff were always very cordial, professional, and helpful. Through talking to him about his practice, it was evident that he cares a great deal about his clients and the community. He also has an impressive litigation record, having successfully recovered for his clients even in very difficult malpractice cases. If someone I knew was hurt and needed an attorney, I would have no hesitation in recommending Mr. Gautreaux’s firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Grace.  And thanks for inviting me to talk with the Mercer Pre-law Society.  You all were terrific, very hospitable, and I really enjoyed the discussion.  I'm glad to help you all in any way.

reviews.text: My dealings with Jarome and his staff were nothing but positive and I would recommend his services. I was treated with dignity, respect, and honesty in a time when I greatly needed it. Truly an office of professionalism and integrity!

I am very satisfied with the performance of the Gautreaux Law firm. They handled all aspects of my case promptly and kept me informed all through the process. My thanks to Andrea, she was a gem. I would highly recommend Jarome & his firm for any legal needs. He and his staff treat you like family.  Good people.

Jarome is a great lawyer.  He and his team are dedicated to getting the results his clients deserve.  He's one of the people whose opinion I most trust when I have a tough question about some legal issue I'm facing in my practice.  He is thoughtful and thorough.  I highly recommend Jarome.
I have worked with Jarome on a number of matters over the past decade.  I can attest to his ethics and professionalism, and to the fact that he is an excellent civil litigation attorney.

I highly recommend Gautreaux Law and Jarome Gautreaux.  He is friendly and very knowledgeable about medical malpractice law.  He exhibits all of the qualities of a true professional.  He and his staff are always available to answer questions about a case.

I highly recommend Gautreaux Law for anyone in need of legal services. Jarome and his staff treat you with respect and are always prompt in responding to questions you may have. They genuinely care about their clients and work diligently to win your case.

I have known Jarome for close to 20 years in a professional and personal capacity.  I have worked on several cases with him over these years.  He is dedicated to his clients and his approach to the practice of law is thoughtful and professional in all respects.  I have referred numerous clients to him in the past and will continue to do so.
Very personable and helpful! Mr. Gautreaux and his assistant were friendly, caring, and eager to help in any way they could.
Great to work with, relieved a lot of stress during a trying time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks a lot!  It's such a pleasure to be able to work with great clients like Spencer.

reviews.text: Jarome and his staff represented us in a medical malpractice suite. They treated us like family and were willing to help us any way possible. Jarome was very professional and thorough investigating our case. He made sure we were informed all through the process. Jarome was well prepared and very professional in his presentation to the jury at the trial. The jury was impressed by his presentation of our case and awarded us $500,000. We will always remember how Jarome  and his staff treated us with friendship and care.
reviews.ownerResponse: We were fortunate to represent the O'Briens.  They went through a lot, but never lost faith and never gave up, and the jury saw what terrific folks they were.  Lawyers take too much credit for jury verdicts.  Good clients are the main reason juries return good verdicts, and the O'Briens were great clients and are two really great people.

reviews.text: From start to finish I was treated with professional care & personal service. Each person that I had interaction with showed me compassion & dignity. I sincerely appreciate the great service I received.  There is no doubt that I would use Gautreaux Law again.

My experience with Jarome Gautreaux & his staff was very professional and hard working as they handle my case. They always kept me updated with everything that was going on. I would highly recommend Jarome Gautreaux to handle your personal injury case.He didn't back down from the insurance company he got me the maximum for my case!!!! Andrea Bone you're the best!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Having a great client like Keith makes our job easy!  Thanks for trusting us to serve as your lawyers.  I wish you the very best.

reviews.text:
My experience with this law firm has been nothing short of professional. My investigation practice primarily deals with law firms and I am honored to deal with Gautreaux & Sizemore, LLC. This firm works tirelessly for their clients and is able to deliver results. This firm is available for their client anytime. Give these guys a try you will not be sorry.

Michael Wagner.

Mr. Gautreaux and his staff worked very hard to get my medical malpractice case settled.    My phone calls were always promptly returned and they kept me well informed about what was going on in my case.  That's why I recommend them to anyone who needs a good attorney.

I recently had the pleasure of contacting Gautreaux & Sizemore, LLC regarding a personal injury claim. The staff was very professional and attentive to my needs. I spoke to one of the lawyers, Jarome Gautreaux.  He was very detailed in our conversation to ensure all of my questions were answered. My family and I are very happy with the resolution to my problem.  I highly recommend this law firm for any legal matters.
